title: Death Sound
description: Plays a sound when entities die within render distance. Configurable via GUI and commands.
body:
Ever need to know when you kill an entity using TNT, crystals, beds, anchors, and even your fist? Then this mod is just for you!

**Sounds**
1. Anvil
2. Bell
3. Ding
4. Experience
5. Levelup
6. Thunder
7. Totem

Easily configure using **/deathsound** or via the **GUI**.

![GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35e157815b496a501c9f83ff295d54613bb5ea77.png)
